report_date_basis: Cowork dashboard report date follows receipt/publication date; underlying business data represents the prior day.
source: Public ESPN RSS + Yahoo Sports RSS feeds

source_detail.yahoo_news_sports: excluded for v0.2 because quick validation showed lower relevance and higher safety/noise risk than Yahoo Sports RSS.

items.headline: Georgia RB Dowdell in hospital after ATV accident

items.headline: Golesh's goal: Return Auburn to national stage

items.headline: Liberty coach feeling rejuvenated after surgery
items.detail: Liberty coach Jamey Chadwell, who had surgery at the beginning of this year for what has been called a "serious but treatable medical condition," said his physical condition now compared with the past couple of years is "night and day."
items.relevance_reason: ESPN precision source
